dashboard.label: Gap Detection
dashboard.description: Identify blind spots — services without event coverage, runbook gaps, and CI vs NFI workstreams

search.query: | inputlookup cmdb_services.csv | join type=left service_name [search `corvus_events` | stats latest(_time) as last_event count as event_count by "unmapped.target" | rename "unmapped.target" as service_name] | eval days_silent=round((now()-last_event)/86400, 1) | where isnull(last_event) OR days_silent > 3 | table service_name host service_type critical days_silent event_count | sort - critical days_silent
`corvus_events` | lookup corvus_cmdb_lookup service_name AS "unmapped.target" OUTPUT service_type | stats dc("unmapped.target") as services count as events by service_type | sort - events
`corvus_events` | lookup corvus_cmdb_lookup service_name AS "unmapped.target" OUTPUT critical | eval criticality=if(critical=1, "Critical", "Non-Critical") | stats count by criticality

panel.title: Runbook Coverage — Services With vs Without Triage

search.query: | inputlookup cmdb_services.csv | join type=left service_name [search `corvus_remediation` | stats count as triage_count by "unmapped.target" | rename "unmapped.target" as service_name] | eval has_triage=if(isnotnull(triage_count) AND triage_count>0, "Yes", "No") | table service_name service_type critical has_triage triage_count | sort has_triage - critical

`corvus_incidents` | spath "unmapped.target" | spath "unmapped.incident_id" | stats count as incident_count dc("unmapped.incident_id") as unique_incidents by "unmapped.target" | where incident_count >= 3 | sort - incident_count | rename "unmapped.target" as Target | eval needs_problem_record=if(incident_count>=3, "Yes", "No")
